test_cases.title: Fresh manual GUI installation of agent via EXE wizard
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed on the target machine (clean state)
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe from UEMS server console (Agent > Computers > Download Agent)
3. Copied installer to target machine
4. Logged in as local administrator
steps: 1. Double-click <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe to launch the installer wizard
2. Read the CAPTCHA text displayed on the captcha label [native_gui_operation: ReadText, automationId=3]
3. Enter the CAPTCHA text into the input field [native_gui_operation: EnterText, automationId=6]
4. Click OK to validate CAPTCHA [native_gui_operation: ClickButton, automationId=7]
5. Wait for the 'Next >' button to appear (timeout 10s) [native_gui_operation: Wait, automationId=2018]
6. Click 'Next >' (first Next — proceeds past info screen) [native_gui_operation: ClickButton, automationId=2018]
7. Click 'Next >' (second Next — starts installation) [native_gui_operation: ClickButton, automationId=2018]
8. Wait for the completion status text to appear (timeout 30s) [native_gui_operation: Wait, automationId=2023]
9. Read the completion status text — expected value: 'Installation Complete' [native_gui_operation: ReadText, automationId=2023]
10. Click Close to exit the installer [native_gui_operation: ClickButton, automationId=2075]
11. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING in services.msc [service_actions: status]
12. Verify registry key HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName is populated [registry_operation: read_key]
13. Verify directory C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ exists with subdirs bin\, conf\, logs\ [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installer wizard completes all steps without errors
2. Completion text reads 'Installation Complete'
3. ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service status = RUNNING
4. Registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName contains the DS/server hostname
5. C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\, conf\, logs\ directories exist

test_cases.title: Manual GUI install with invalid CAPTCHA entry
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed on the target machine
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Logged in as local administrator
steps: 1. Launch <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
2. Read the CAPTCHA text displayed [native_gui_operation: ReadText, automationId=3]
3. Enter an INCORRECT CAPTCHA value into the input field [native_gui_operation: EnterText, automationId=6]
4. Click OK [native_gui_operation: ClickButton, automationId=7]
5. Observe the error message displayed
6. Verify the installer does not proceed to the Next screen
test_cases.expected_result:
1. An error message is displayed indicating invalid CAPTCHA
2. The installer remains on the CAPTCHA screen
3. The user can re-enter the correct CAPTCHA to proceed

test_cases.title: Manual GUI install with corrupt installer EXE
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. A corrupted copy of <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe (truncated or modified binary)
2. Logged in as local administrator
steps: 1. Attempt to launch the corrupted <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
2. Observe the system response
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Windows shows an error (e.g., 'This app can't run on your PC' or 'The file is corrupted')
2. No agent service is installed
3. No agent files are created under C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\

test_cases.title: Manual GUI install without administrator privileges
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Logged in as a STANDARD user (non-admin)
steps: 1. Double-click <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
2. If UAC prompts, click 'No' or do not enter admin credentials
3. Observe the installer behavior
test_cases.expected_result:
1. The installer either fails to launch or shows a permission error
2. Agent service is NOT installed
3. No files are created under C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\

test_cases.title: Manual GUI install on Windows 11
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Windows 11 machine, logged in as administrator
steps: 1. Launch <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
2. Complete the full wizard flow (CAPTCHA > Next > Next > Wait for completion) [native_gui_operation]
3. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
4. Verify registry keys under HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ [registry_operation: read_key]
5. Verify install directory C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation completes with 'Installation Complete' message
2. Agent service is RUNNING
3. All registry keys are populated
4. Install directory exists with bin\, conf\, logs\

test_cases.title: Manual GUI install on Windows Server 2019
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Windows Server 2019 machine, logged in as administrator
steps: 1. Launch <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
2. Complete the full wizard flow [native_gui_operation]

4. Verify registry keys under HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ [registry_operation: read_key]

test_cases.title: Manual GUI install when agent is already installed (re-install)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent IS already installed and running on the machine
2. Downloaded fresh <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Logged in as administrator
steps: 1. Launch <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe while agent is already installed
2. Observe installer behavior — does it detect existing installation?
3. If prompted, proceed through the wizard
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is still RUNNING after re-install [service_actions: status]
5. Verify registry keys are intact [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installer detects existing agent and either upgrades or notifies user
2. Agent service remains RUNNING after the operation
3. No duplicate services or registry entries

test_cases.title: Fresh silent installation using EXE /silent flag
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Command Prompt opened as Administrator
steps: 1. Run: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent [run_bat: execute]
2. Wait for the process to complete (timeout 120s)
3. Verify no GUI window appeared during installation
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify registry key HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName is populated [registry_operation: read_key]
6. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ directory exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. No GUI wizard appears
2. Agent installs silently
3. ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING
4. Registry keys populated correctly
5. Install directory created with bin\, conf\, logs\

test_cases.title: Silent EXE install without administrator privileges
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Command Prompt opened as STANDARD user
steps: 1. Run: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent
2. Observe the command output
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation fails with a permission error
2. Agent service is NOT installed
3. No files created under C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\

test_cases.title: Silent EXE install with invalid argument
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Run: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /invalidarg
2. Observe the behavior
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installer either ignores invalid argument and shows GUI, or returns an error
2. Agent is NOT silently installed with the invalid argument

test_cases.title: Silent EXE install with corrupt installer
test_cases.prerequisites:

2. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Run the corrupted EXE with /silent flag
2. Observe the command output
test_cases.expected_result:

2. No agent service installed
3. No agent files created

test_cases.title: Fresh silent MSI installation via msiexec command
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded and extracted MSI zip (UEMSAgent.msi, UEMSAgent.mst, DMRootCA-Server.crt, DMRootCA.crt)
3. Command Prompt opened as Administrator in the extracted folder
steps: 1. Run: msiexec /i "UEMSAgent.msi" /qn TRANSFORMS="UEMSAgent.mst" ENABLESILENT=yes REBOOT=ReallySuppress INSTALLSOURCE=Manual SERVER_ROOT_CRT="%cd%\DMRootCA-Server.crt" DS_ROOT_CRT="%cd%\DMRootCA.crt" /lv "Agentinstalllog.txt" [run_command]
2. Wait for msiexec process to complete (timeout 120s) [task_manager: verify_process, expect=processnotrunning, process_name=msiexec.exe]
3. Verify Agentinstalllog.txt is created in the current directory [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName is populated [registry_operation: read_key]
6. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ directory exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. MSI install completes silently
2. Agentinstalllog.txt is created with no errors
3. Agent service is RUNNING
4. Registry keys populated
5. Install directory present

test_cases.title: Silent MSI install with missing UEMSAgent.mst transform file
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Extracted MSI zip but DELETED UEMSAgent.mst
3. Administrator CMD in extraction folder
steps: 1. Run the msiexec command with TRANSFORMS="UEMSAgent.mst" [run_command]
2. Observe the error output
3. Check Agentinstalllog.txt for error details [file_folder_modification: value_should_be_present]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation fails with 'Error applying transforms' message
2. Agentinstalllog.txt contains transform error
3. Agent service is NOT installed

test_cases.title: Silent MSI install with missing certificate files
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Extracted MSI zip but DELETED DMRootCA-Server.crt and DMRootCA.crt
3. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Run the msiexec command referencing the missing cert files [run_command]
2. Observe the result
3. Check Agentinstalllog.txt
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation may complete but agent communication fails due to certificate validation errors
2. Or installation fails outright referencing missing cert files

test_cases.title: Silent MSI install without administrator privileges
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Extracted MSI zip
3. CMD opened as STANDARD user
steps: 1. Run the msiexec command as standard user
2. Observe the error
test_cases.expected_result:
1. msiexec fails with permissions error
2. Agent is NOT installed
3. No agent service or directory created

test_cases.title: Silent MSI install interrupted mid-way (cancel)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Extracted MSI zip
3. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Start the msiexec command
2. While installation is in progress, kill the msiexec.exe process [task_manager: kill_process]
3. Verify agent state after interruption
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation rolls back cleanly
2. Agent service is NOT running
3. Partial files may be cleaned up by MSI rollback

test_cases.title: Silent MSI install with corrupt MSI file
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Corrupted UEMSAgent.msi
3. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Run msiexec /i with the corrupted MSI file
2. Observe the error
test_cases.expected_result:
1. msiexec fails reporting corrupt or invalid package
2. No agent service installed
3. No agent files created

test_cases.title: Fresh agent installation via setup.bat from extracted zip
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is NOT installed
2. Downloaded <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.zip from server
3. Extracted zip to C:\Installers\ZipExtract\
4. Administrator CMD in extracted directory
steps: 1. Verify all required files exist in the extracted folder: setup.bat, UEMSAgent.msi, UEMSAgent.mst, DMRootCA-Server.crt, DMRootCA.crt, <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
2. Run: setup.bat [run_bat: execute]
3. Wait for the batch file to complete
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName is populated [registry_operation: read_key]
6. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ exists with bin\, conf\, logs\ [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. setup.bat completes without errors
2. Agent service is RUNNING
3. Registry keys populated
4. Install directory with all subdirectories present

test_cases.title: Zip install with missing UEMSAgent.mst in extracted folder
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed
2. Extracted zip but DELETED UEMSAgent.mst
3. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Run: setup.bat [run_bat: execute]
2. Observe the error output
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation fails with 'Error applying transforms' error
2. Agent service is NOT installed

test_cases.title: Zip install from corrupt zip archive
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. A corrupted <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.zip (truncated download)
2. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Attempt to extract the corrupt zip [zip_operation: extract]
2. Observe the extraction result
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Extraction fails with corrupt archive error
2. Files are not fully extracted
3. Cannot proceed with installation

test_cases.title: Zip install using silent EXE from extracted contents
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed
2. Extracted zip contains <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe
3. Administrator CMD in extracted folder
steps: 1. Run: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent from the extracted folder [run_bat: execute]
2. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
3. Verify registry keys [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Silent install from zip contents succeeds
2. Agent service RUNNING
3. Registry keys populated

test_cases.title: Automatic push installation from server to target machine
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Target machine is in same domain/workgroup as UEMS server
2. Admin credentials configured in UEMS server for target machine
3. WMI accessible from server to target
4. Agent NOT installed on target
5. Ports open between server and target
steps: 1. In UEMS server console, navigate to Agent > Scope Of Management > Computers > Add Computers (Qengine — browser step)
2. Add the domain/workgroup and provide admin credentials (Qengine — browser step)
3. Select the target computer and click Install Agents (Qengine — browser step)
4. On the target machine, wait for ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service to start (timeout 300s) [service_actions: status]
5. Verify registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName is populated [registry_operation: read_key]
6. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ directory exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
7. Verify DCAgentService.exe process is running [task_manager: verify_process]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Agent installs automatically via push
2. ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING
3. Registry keys populated
4. Install directory present
5. Agent appears as Active in server SOM page

test_cases.title: Push install via UEMSRemoteInstaller only (force method isolation)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. On the DS/Server machine: rename remcom.exe to remcom.exe.bak and remcom64.exe to remcom64.exe.bak in C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\
3. Disable WMI service on target: net stop winmgmt /y
steps: 1. Rename C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\remcom.exe to remcom.exe.bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
2. Rename C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\remcom64.exe to remcom64.exe.bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
3. Stop WMI service on target: net stop winmgmt /y [service_actions: stop]
4. Trigger push install from UEMS server console (Qengine — browser step)
5. On target, verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING (timeout 300s) [service_actions: status]
6. TEARDOWN: Start WMI service: net start winmgmt [service_actions: start]
7. TEARDOWN: Rename remcom.exe.bak back to remcom.exe [file_folder_operation: rename]
8. TEARDOWN: Rename remcom64.exe.bak back to remcom64.exe [file_folder_operation: rename]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push install succeeds using only UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe
2. Agent service is RUNNING
3. Teardown restores all renamed files and services

test_cases.title: Push install via WMI only (force method isolation)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. On DS/Server: rename UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe and remcom.exe to .bak
steps: 1. Rename C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe to UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe.bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
2. Rename C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\remcom.exe to remcom.exe.bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
3. Trigger push install from UEMS server console (Qengine — browser step)
4. On target, verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING (timeout 300s) [service_actions: status]
5. TEARDOWN: Rename UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe.bak back [file_folder_operation: rename]
6. TEARDOWN: Rename remcom.exe.bak back [file_folder_operation: rename]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push install succeeds using only WMI
2. Agent service is RUNNING
3. Teardown restores all renamed files

test_cases.title: Push install via Remcom only (force method isolation)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. On DS/Server: rename UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe to .bak
3. Disable WMI on target
steps: 1. Rename C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe to UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe.bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
2. Stop WMI service: net stop winmgmt /y [service_actions: stop]
3. Trigger push install from UEMS server console (Qengine — browser step)
4. On target, verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING (timeout 300s) [service_actions: status]
5. TEARDOWN: Start WMI: net start winmgmt [service_actions: start]
6. TEARDOWN: Rename UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe.bak back [file_folder_operation: rename]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push install succeeds using only remcom.exe
2. Agent service is RUNNING

test_cases.title: Push install fails when all three methods are disabled
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. On DS/Server: rename UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe and remcom.exe to .bak
3. Disable WMI on target
steps: 1. Rename UEMSRemoteInstaller.exe to .bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
2. Rename remcom.exe to .bak [file_folder_operation: rename]
3. Stop WMI on target [service_actions: stop]
4. Trigger push install from UEMS server (Qengine — browser step)
5. Wait 300 seconds for attempted install
6. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is NOT installed on target [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
7. TEARDOWN: Start WMI, rename files back
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push installation fails — all three methods unavailable
2. UEMS server console shows installation failure status for target machine
3. Agent service does NOT exist on target
test_cases.remarks: FAILURE SCENARIO — All push methods disabled

test_cases.title: Push install with invalid admin credentials
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. UEMS server configured with WRONG admin credentials for target
steps: 1. In UEMS server console, add target machine with invalid credentials (Qengine — browser step)
2. Trigger installation (Qengine — browser step)
3. Wait and observe server console for error status
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is NOT installed on target [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push install fails due to authentication failure
2. UEMS server shows credential error for the target machine
3. No agent installed on target

test_cases.title: Push install with firewall blocking required ports
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. Windows Firewall enabled on target blocking all inbound connections
steps: 1. Enable Windows Firewall blocking all inbound on target machine
2. Trigger push install from UEMS server (Qengine — browser step)
3. Wait for installation timeout
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is NOT installed [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push install fails — server cannot reach target
2. UEMS console shows network/connectivity error
3. No agent installed

test_cases.title: Push install with low-privilege user credentials
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. UEMS server configured with standard (non-admin) user credentials
steps: 1. In UEMS server, configure low-privilege user creds for target domain (Qengine — browser step)
2. Trigger push install (Qengine — browser step)
3. Verify agent is NOT installed on target [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Push install fails — insufficient privileges
2. Server shows permission error
3. No agent installed

test_cases.title: Verify agent service startup type is Automatic after install
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent is installed via any method
2. ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING
steps: 1. Check the service startup type for ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service [service_actions: get_startup]
2. Verify registry HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\DCAgent Start value = 2 (Automatic) [registry_operation: read_dword]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Service startup type is 'Automatic' (AUTO)
2. Registry Start value = 2

test_cases.title: Verify all required registry keys after installation
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed via any method
steps: 1. Read registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerName — should not be empty [registry_operation: read_key]
2. Read registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ServerPort — should have valid port [registry_operation: read_key]
3. Read registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\AgentVersion — should have version string [registry_operation: read_key]
4. Read registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\InstallDir — should point to install path [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. ServerName contains DS/server hostname
2. ServerPort has valid port number
3. AgentVersion has version string
4. InstallDir = C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\

test_cases.title: Verify install directory structure after installation
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed
steps: 1. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
2. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\ exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
3. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\conf\ exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
4. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\logs\ exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
5. Verify DCAgentService.exe exists in bin\ [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. All directories exist: UEMS_Agent\, bin\, conf\, logs\
2. DCAgentService.exe is present in bin\

test_cases.title: Verify agent process is running after installation
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed
steps: 1. Verify DCAgentService.exe process is running in Task Manager [task_manager: verify_process]
test_cases.expected_result: 1. DCAgentService.exe is listed as a running process

test_cases.title: Verify agent log file is created after installation
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed
steps: 1. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\logs\DCAgentService.log exists [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
2. Verify the log file is not empty (size > 0) [file_folder_operation: check_size]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. DCAgentService.log exists in the logs directory
2. Log file has content (size > 0 bytes)

test_cases.title: Verify agent service restarts automatically after being killed
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent installed and service RUNNING
steps: 1. Kill the DCAgentService.exe process [task_manager: kill_process]
2. Wait 60 seconds [task_manager: verify_process, max_wait_time=60]
3. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING again [service_actions: status]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. After killing the process, the service auto-restarts
2. ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service status returns to RUNNING within 60 seconds

test_cases.title: Verify agent service starts after system reboot
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent installed and service RUNNING
2. Service startup type is Automatic
steps: 1. Restart the machine [machine_operation: restart]
2. After reboot, verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
3. Verify DCAgentService.exe process is running [task_manager: verify_process]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. After reboot, agent service automatically starts
2. Service is RUNNING
3. DCAgentService.exe is running

test_cases.title: Uninstall agent via Control Panel GUI with OTP
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent installed and RUNNING
2. OTP obtained from UEMS server console (Agent > Scope of Management > Computers > View OTP)
steps: 1. Open Settings > Apps (Windows 10/11) [native_gui_operation]
2. Type 'UEMS-Agent' in the search box [native_gui_operation: EnterText, automationId=SearchEditBox]
3. Double-click 'ManageEngine UEMS - Agent' in the list [native_gui_operation: DoubleClick, automationId=ListViewSubItem-0]
4. Wait for Uninstall button to appear (timeout 30s) [native_gui_operation: Wait, automationId=UninstallBtn]
5. Click Uninstall button [native_gui_operation: ClickButton, automationId=UninstallBtn]
6. Enter the OTP when prompted
7. Wait for completion (timeout 420s) [native_gui_operation: Wait, automationId=SuccessUninstall]
8. Read completion text — expected: 'Agent successfully uninstalled' [native_gui_operation: ReadText, automationId=SuccessUninstall]
9. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is STOPPED or not present [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
10. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ is removed or empty [file_folder_operation: verify_absence]
11. Verify registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ is removed [registry_operation: check_key_not_exists]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Uninstall completes with 'Agent successfully uninstalled'
2. Agent service is stopped/removed
3. Install directory removed
4. Registry keys removed

test_cases.title: Silent uninstall via command line
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent installed and RUNNING
steps: 1. Run: C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\bin\DCAgent.exe /uninstall /s [run_bat: execute]
2. Wait for DCAgent.exe process to complete [task_manager: verify_process, expect=processnotrunning]
3. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is STOPPED or absent [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
4. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ is removed [file_folder_operation: verify_absence]
5. Verify registry HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ is removed [registry_operation: check_key_not_exists]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Silent uninstall completes
2. Agent service removed
3. Install directory removed
4. Registry keys removed

test_cases.title: Uninstall and verify clean re-install
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent installed
steps: 1. Uninstall agent (silent method) [run_bat: execute]
2. Verify agent is fully removed: service, registry, install directory [service_actions: status] [registry_operation: check_key_not_exists] [file_folder_operation: verify_absence]
3. Re-install agent via silent EXE [run_bat: execute]
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify all registry keys recreated [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Uninstall completes cleanly
2. Re-install succeeds without errors
3. Agent service RUNNING after re-install
4. All registry keys present after re-install

test_cases.title: Attempt uninstall without OTP (GUI method)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent installed and RUNNING
2. No OTP available
steps: 1. Open Settings > Apps
2. Find and click Uninstall on ManageEngine UEMS - Agent
3. When OTP prompt appears, enter an incorrect OTP or leave blank
4. Observe result
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Uninstall fails or is blocked — OTP is required
2. Agent service remains RUNNING
3. Agent files remain intact

test_cases.title: Install agent when install directory already exists with stale files
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent NOT installed but C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ exists with leftover files from a previous partial install
steps: 1. Install agent via silent EXE [run_bat: execute]
2. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
3. Verify registry keys are correct [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installer handles existing directory gracefully
2. Agent installs successfully
3. Service is RUNNING

test_cases.title: Install agent when disk space is critically low
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed
2. Target drive has less than 50MB free space
3. Administrator CMD
steps: 1. Attempt silent install: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent [run_bat: execute]
2. Observe the result
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Installation fails gracefully with disk space error
2. No partial files left behind
3. Agent service NOT installed

test_cases.title: Install agent with very long computer name (15+ characters)
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Computer name set to maximum length (15 characters for NetBIOS)
2. Agent NOT installed
steps: 1. Install agent via silent EXE [run_bat: execute]
2. Verify agent service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
3. Verify registry keys contain correct computer name [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Agent installs successfully
2. Long computer name is handled correctly
3. All registry keys populated

test_cases.title: Install agent with special characters in computer name
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Computer name contains special characters (e.g., hyphens, underscores)
2. Agent NOT installed
steps: 1. Install agent via silent EXE [run_bat: execute]
2. Verify agent service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
3. Verify registry keys are populated correctly [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Agent installs successfully
2. Special characters in computer name handled
3. Agent registers with server

test_cases.title: Install agent with Unicode characters in OS user profile path
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Windows user account with Unicode characters in username (e.g., Japanese, Chinese characters)
2. Agent NOT installed
steps: 1. Log in as the Unicode-named user with admin rights
2. Install agent via silent EXE [run_bat: execute]
3. Verify agent service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Agent installs successfully regardless of user profile path encoding
2. Service is RUNNING

test_cases.title: Verify agent service runs under SYSTEM account
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed
steps: 1. Check the logon account for ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service [service_actions: get_logon]
test_cases.expected_result: 1. Service logon account is 'LocalSystem' or 'NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM'

test_cases.title: Verify agent install directory permissions
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed
steps: 1. Check permissions on C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ [file_folder_operation: check_permission]
2. Verify standard users do NOT have write access to the agent directory
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Standard users have read/execute only — no write access
2. SYSTEM and Administrators have full control

test_cases.title: Verify agent certificates are installed correctly
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent freshly installed
steps: 1. Verify DMRootCA-Server.crt is present in agent install directory [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
2. Verify DMRootCA.crt is present [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
3. Optionally read cert subject [certificate_operation: get_cert_value]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Both certificate files exist
2. Certificate subjects match expected UEMS CA values

test_cases.title: Run two installer instances simultaneously
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed
2. Two copies of <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe available
3. Administrator access
steps: 1. Launch first installer: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent
2. Immediately launch second installer: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent
3. Wait for both to complete
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify only one agent installation exists [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Only one installation succeeds — MSI mutex prevents concurrent installs
2. Agent service is RUNNING
3. Single set of registry keys exists

test_cases.title: Install newer agent version over existing older version
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Older version of agent is installed and RUNNING
2. Newer <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe downloaded
steps: 1. Note current AgentVersion from registry [registry_operation: read_key]
2. Run newer installer: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent [run_bat: execute]
3. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
4. Read AgentVersion from registry — should be newer [registry_operation: read_key]
5. Verify agent configuration (ServerName, ServerPort) preserved [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Upgrade completes without errors
2. Agent service is RUNNING
3. AgentVersion shows newer version
4. Server configuration preserved from old install

test_cases.title: Verify complete cleanup after uninstall — no leftover files or registry
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent was installed and then uninstalled
steps: 1. Verify C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ does NOT exist [file_folder_operation: verify_absence]
2. Verify HKLM\SOFTWARE\AdventNet\DesktopCentral\DCAgent\ does NOT exist [registry_operation: check_key_not_exists]
3. Verify HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\DCAgent does NOT exist [registry_operation: check_key_not_exists]
4. Verify DCAgentService.exe is NOT running [task_manager: verify_process, expect=processnotrunning]
5. Verify no ManageEngine UEMS Agent in Control Panel Programs list
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Install directory fully removed
2. All registry keys removed (both DCAgent and Services\DCAgent)
3. No running processes
4. Agent not listed in Programs and Features

test_cases.title: Partial uninstall leaves stale registry — verify re-install handles it
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent was installed
2. Manually delete install directory but leave registry keys intact (simulating partial uninstall)
steps: 1. Delete C:\Program Files (x86)\ManageEngine\UEMS_Agent\ directory [file_folder_operation: delete]
2. Verify registry keys still exist [registry_operation: check_key_exists]
3. Attempt fresh install via silent EXE [run_bat: execute]
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify registry keys are updated correctly [registry_operation: read_key]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Fresh install handles stale registry gracefully
2. Agent installs successfully
3. Service is RUNNING
4. Registry keys point to correct new install

test_cases.title: Network disconnect during push install — server retry behavior
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed on target
2. Network connectivity between server and target is controllable
steps: 1. Trigger push install from server (Qengine — browser step)
2. Immediately disconnect network on target machine
3. Wait 30 seconds, then reconnect network
4. Wait for push install retry (timeout 600s)
5. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service status on target [service_actions: status]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Initial push attempt fails due to network drop
2. Server retries push after network is restored
3. Agent eventually installs successfully (or push shows failed status if retry exhausted)

test_cases.title: Agent registers with Distribution Server after install
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent freshly installed
2. Distribution Server is running and accessible
steps: 1. Verify ServerName in registry points to the correct DS [registry_operation: read_key]
2. Verify agent communication log shows successful connection to DS [file_folder_modification: value_should_be_present]
3. Verify agent appears as Active in UEMS server console (Qengine — browser step)
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Agent successfully connects to configured Distribution Server
2. Log contains successful registration messages
3. Agent appears Active in SOM page

test_cases.title: End-to-end: Download, install, verify, and uninstall agent
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Clean target machine — no agent installed
2. Access to UEMS server console
3. Administrator access on target
steps: 1. Download agent installer from UEMS server console (Qengine — browser step)
2. Copy installer to target machine
3. Run silent install: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent [run_bat: execute]
4. Verify ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify all registry keys [registry_operation: read_key]
6. Verify install directory [file_folder_operation: check_presence]
7. Verify agent appears in SOM (Qengine — browser step)
8. Uninstall agent silently: DCAgent.exe /uninstall /s [run_bat: execute]
9. Verify service removed [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
10. Verify registry cleaned [registry_operation: check_key_not_exists]
11. Verify directory removed [file_folder_operation: verify_absence]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Full lifecycle: install → verify → uninstall succeeds
2. All intermediate checks pass
3. Machine returns to clean state after uninstall

test_cases.title: Power failure during agent installation
test_cases.prerequisites:
1. Agent NOT installed
2. Ability to simulate power loss (VM snapshot or hard power off)
steps: 1. Start silent install: <BranchOfficeName>_Agent.exe /silent
2. During installation (within first 30 seconds), hard power off the machine
3. Power on the machine
4. Check the state: Is agent service present? Are partial files left behind?
5. Attempt fresh install
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Machine recovers without corruption
2. Partial install may leave artifacts
3. Fresh install should succeed after cleanup or MSI repair

test_cases.title: Agent service stop and manual restart
test_cases.prerequisites: 1. Agent installed and service RUNNING
steps: 1. Stop ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service [service_actions: stop]
2. Verify service status is STOPPED [service_actions: status, expect=serviceStopped]
3. Start ManageEngine UEMS Agent Service [service_actions: start]
4. Verify service status is RUNNING [service_actions: status]
5. Verify DCAgentService.exe process is running [task_manager: verify_process]
test_cases.expected_result:
1. Service stops successfully
2. Service starts back successfully
3. Agent process runs after manual restart
